description: BioRender is a web-based platform for creating scientific illustrations, figures, templates, graphs, posters, and presentations for life-science communication. It provides a large library of scientific icons and templates plus collaborative editing tools for researchers and teams.
summary: BioRender exposes a documented MCP server at `https://mcp.services.biorender.com/mcp`, authenticated via BioRender OAuth account connection from supported AI assistants; no public REST, GraphQL, or CLI developer surfaces were found on biorender.com.
